name: Southern Peanut-Butter Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Chill the pie crust.
2. Beat the eggs.
3. Add corn syrup, sugar, peanut butter, and vanilla to the eggs. Beat until smooth.
4. Stir in the peanuts.
5. Pour the filling into the chilled shell.
6. Bake for 15 minutes at 400°F (200°C). Then reduce the temperature to 350°F (175°C) and bake for an additional 30-35 minutes, or until set.
7. Let cool.
